tasks.title: Discord bridge core and slash command registration
tasks.description:
Local `discord-bridge.js` bridge with slash commands: `/help`, `/n8n-linear`, `/deploy`, `/sales-support`, `/app-status`, `/github-issue`, `/dev`. DM forwarding to n8n, guild registration, and Greek `/help` catalog.

Commit: `13ce0b4`

tasks.title: n8n → Linear natural-language workflow
tasks.description:
Imported and patched n8n workflow **Discord → Linear Bot** (`fxxutl0HMJbv3p4G`) on n8n.techflowlabs.gr. Supports create/search/assign/update issues, issue summaries, and Discord-formatted replies.

Files: `discord-linear-bot.json`, `scripts/patch-workflow.js`, `scripts/patch-bridge-flow.js`

tasks.title: Plan / go flow with Linear documents and GitHub tracking
tasks.description:
`plan fix ENG-N in repo` creates a Linear plan document on the issue, opens a GitHub tracking issue, stores pending plan in bridge memory, and executes on `go`.

Includes shortcut routing fixes, Linear `documentCreate`, and GitHub plan issue reuse.

Docs: `docs/conversation-summary.md`

tasks.title: Bridge-local AI execute (go → branch → PR)
tasks.description:
AI-driven code edits run in the bridge (not n8n): file selection, search/replace patches, branch creation, commits, and PR with `Fixes #N`. Includes timeouts, heartbeats, and 403 resilience when GitHub issue creation is blocked.

Files: `lib/github-plan-executor.js`, `lib/github-api.js`, `lib/openai.js`

tasks.title: Commit review pipeline and #commit-summary channel
tasks.description:
AI commit reviews posted to `#commit-summary`: interactive repo/branch picker, auto-review polling, optional GitHub push webhook, persistent review store reused by sales-support.

Files: `lib/commit-review.js`, `lib/auto-commit-review.js`, `lib/commit-summary-flow.js`, `lib/webhook-server.js`

tasks.title: /sales-support employee briefing (Greek, two-tier answers)
tasks.description:
Greek sales/support assistant with internal notes and customer-ready phrasing. Integrates knowledge docs, code activity, commit reviews, and FAQ. Reply-to-message source lookup (`πηγές` / `sources`).

Files: `lib/sales-support.js`, `lib/sales-support-delivery.js`, `lib/unified-emblem-context.js`

tasks.title: EmblemTameiaki-Knowledge RAG and vector retrieval
tasks.description:
Knowledge repo loading via git (wiki / sales-support branches), semantic embeddings index, vendor PDF/AAR text extraction, and `npm run kb:reindex`.

Commits: `13ce0b4`, `3b7c0d3`

Files: `lib/knowledge-base.js`, `lib/knowledge-indexer.js`, `lib/retrieval.js`, `lib/vector-store.js`

tasks.title: /app-status and /dev assistants
tasks.description:
App status assistant for recent features/risks and dev assistant for implementation plans with optional `.md` attachment.

Files: `lib/app-status-assistant.js`, `lib/dev-assistant.js`, `lib/dev-assistant-flow.js`

tasks.title: /deploy GitHub Actions trigger
tasks.description:
Role-gated `/deploy` slash command triggers EmblemTameiaki CI (`dev` / `qa` / `prod`) via GitHub Actions workflow dispatch.

File: `discord-bridge.js`

tasks.title: /github-issue creation with AI type classification
tasks.description:
Create GitHub issues from Discord with automatic bug/feature/task classification and labels.

Commit: `ae0f9ef`

Files: `lib/github-issue-flow.js`, `lib/github-issue-classifier.js`

tasks.title: Auto-escalation for unanswered QA channel questions
tasks.description:
Watches configured Discord channels, sends hints to testers, tags dev roles, and DMs owners after timeout.

Files: `lib/escalation.js`, `lib/escalation-hint.js`, `config/escalation.json`

tasks.title: Discord knowledge capture and promotion workflow
tasks.description:
Passive channel logging, emoji/reply promotion of solved threads, AI extraction, maintainer review channel, and PR to EmblemTameiaki-Knowledge.

Files: `lib/knowledge-capture-store.js`, `lib/knowledge-promotion.js`, `lib/knowledge-review.js`, `scripts/import-discord-history.js`

tasks.title: Assistant hub auto-threading for slash commands
tasks.description:
Each slash command in hub channels opens a dedicated public thread; `/sales-support` answers and source links stay inside the thread.

Commits: `228a581`, `e769542`, `212f86c`

tasks.title: n8n workflow reliability fixes (parallel AI race, search fallback, summarize shortcuts)
tasks.description:
Fixed parallel AI/shortcut race on issue summaries, nested webhook body unwrap, search query fallback, `summary of ENG-N` shortcuts, and plan path without `Parse AI Response` dependency.

Docs: `docs/conversation-summary.md` — Fixes deployed section

tasks.title: OpenAI migration and environment hardening
tasks.description:
Replaced Anthropic with OpenAI (`gpt-4o`) for reviews, sales-support, dev assistant, and plan execution. Added `dotenv` override, improved startup diagnostics, and Discord message length truncation.

Docs: `docs/session-summary.md`
